title: Xiridium
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Xiridium''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] of the same group as [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']]. It was found in [[Outpost 327]] when the latter was captured in the [[Mission to Zhar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

[[Category:Lambda-class T-4a shuttles]]
[[Category:Starships of the Galactic Empire]]
